chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD R.A No. 225 of 2000 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For hearing of CMA 294/2016 as well as main case. 22.12.2016. None present for applicant. Respondent No.1 Mir Ali Nawaz present in person. -.-.-. The order sheets of the case show that for past many dates the applicants’ side is absent and not proceeding with the matter. This is going on since 09.04.2015. On 09.12.2016 the matter was adjourned as an indulgence and only in the interest of justice though on that date respondents’ Counsel was ready to proceed with the matter. Today, respondent No.1 is present in person and submits that on one hand the applicants’ side has filed this Revision Application in order to forestall the remedy provided to the respondents by the learned Courts below and on the other hand the applicants’ side is continuously absent. Today, neither applicants nor their Counsel is present nor there is any intimation for such an absence. In these circumstances, this Revision Application is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE Ali Haider
